name_local: お好み焼き 美津の

phrases.intent_en: Where is the teppan griddle table
phrases.text_local: てっぱんの テーブルは どこですか？
phrases.cultural_note: The best seats for okonomiyaki are at the counter surrounding the large teppan griddle, where you can watch the master cook. The staff will guide you to your specific seat.

likely_response.local: おくの カウンターです。
likely_response.translation_en: It's the counter in the back.

responses.english: It's the counter in the back.
responses.local: おくの カウンターです。

phrases.intent_en: Where do I write my name for waitlist
phrases.text_local: なまえを かくところは どこですか？
phrases.cultural_note: Many popular Osaka restaurants use a clipboard or whiteboard hung outside for self-service waitlisting. Write your name clearly and wait to be called.

likely_response.local: そとの ボードに かいてください。
likely_response.translation_en: Please write it on the board outside.

responses.english: Please write it on the board outside.
responses.local: そとの ボードに かいてください。

phrases.intent_en: Is the Mizuno yaki available now
phrases.text_local: みずのやきは いま ありますか？
phrases.cultural_note: Mizuno yaki is the house specialty, a hearty mix of pork, squid, shrimp, and more. It is almost always available as it is the signature dish.

phrases.intent_en: Do I pay at the table or counter
phrases.text_local: おかいけいは テーブルですか、レジですか？
phrases.cultural_note: It is common in casual okonomiyaki restaurants to take your bill to a register near the entrance to pay after your meal, rather than paying at the table.

likely_response.local: レジで おねがいします。

responses.local: レジで おねがいします。
